--- 文件: core/memory_items.py (第 221 至 297 行，共 297 行) ---
 221 |             importance=data.get("importance", 0.5),
 222 |             confidence=data.get("confidence", 0.8),
 223 |             status=data.get("status", MemoryStatus.ACTIVE.value),
 224 |             version=data.get("version", 1),
 225 |             metadata=data.get("metadata", {}),
 226 |         )
 227 | 
 228 |     def to_json(self, indent: int = 2) -> str:
 229 |         return json.dumps(self.to_dict(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=indent)
 230 | 
 231 |     @classmethod
 232 |     def from_json(cls, json_str: str) -> "MemoryItem":
 233 |         return cls.from_dict(json.loads(json_str))
 234 | 
 235 |     def searchable_text(self) -> str:
 236 |         """返回用于关键词检索的文本。"""
 237 |         parts = [
 238 |             self.kind,
 239 |             self.title,
 240 |             self.content,
 241 |             self.project,
 242 |             " ".join(self.concepts),
 243 |             " ".join(self.files),
 244 |             " ".join(self.source_session_ids),
 245 |         ]
 246 |         return "\n".join(part for part in parts if part)
 247 | 
 248 | 
 249 | @dataclass
 250 | class MemoryRecallResult:
 251 |     """统一召回结果。"""
 252 | 
 253 |     item: MemoryItem
 254 |     score: float = 0.0
 255 |     source: str = "long_term"
 256 |     reason: str = ""
 257 | 
 258 |     def __post_init__(self) -> None:
 259 |         if isinstance(self.item, dict):
 260 |             self.item = MemoryItem.from_dict(self.item)
 261 |         self.score = float(self.score or 0.0)
 262 | 
 263 |     def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 264 |         return {
 265 |             "item": self.item.to_dict(),
 266 |             "score": self.score,
 267 |             "source": self.source,
 268 |             "reason": self.reason,
 269 |         }
 270 | 
 271 |     @classmethod
 272 |     def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> "MemoryRecallResult":
 273 |         return cls(
 274 |             item=MemoryItem.from_dict(data.get("item", {})),
 275 |             score=data.get("score", 0.0),
 276 |             source=data.get("source", "long_term"),
 277 |             reason=data.get("reason", ""),
 278 |         )
 279 | 
 280 | 
 281 | def _normalize_enum_value(value: Any, enum_cls: Any, default: str) -> str:
 282 |     if isinstance(value, enum_cls):
 283 |         return value.value
 284 |     if isinstance(value, str):
 285 |         normalized = value.strip().lower()
 286 |         valid_values = {item.value for item in enum_cls}
 287 |         if normalized in valid_values:
 288 |             return normalized
 289 |     return default
 290 | 
 291 | 
 292 | def _clamp_float(value: Any, default: float) -> float:
 293 |     try:
 294 |         number = float(value)
 295 |     except (TypeError, ValueError):
 296 |         return default
 297 |     return max(0.0, min(1.0, number))
--- 读取完毕 ---
